name: FinTrade Sherpa, Inc.
summary: FinTrade Sherpa, Inc. (formerly Lode-Star Mining Inc.) is a Nevada-incorporated FinTech company developing Alpha-Optimus, an AI-powered financial research platform. The platform provides AI-driven stock movement forecasts, market intelligence tools, and institutional-grade research via a tiered subscription model. It targets retail investors, financial professionals, and institutional clients. The company acquired AI intellectual property via an Asset Purchase Agreement and licenses underlying AI technology from Predictive Technology, LLC.
